allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\marci\\Desktop\\moje strony\\leavingamerica"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node.exe" -ArgumentList "node_modules\\.bin\\astro dev --port 4321" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\astro_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\astro_err.txt"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $proc.Kill\(\); Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\astro_out.txt","$env:TEMP\\astro_err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -Last 30)
